# Mission 14 Signoff

## Mission
Mission 14 - Customer / Vehicle Foundation Design

## Decision
Mission 14 locks Customer / Vehicle foundation design.

## Confirmed
- No code was created
- No SQL was created
- No SQL was executed
- No database was changed
- No Customer Portal was changed
- No legacy file was changed
- No migration was executed
- No login was changed
- No users were created
- No roles were assigned
- No permissions were changed
- No workflow write was performed
- No tenant implementation was performed
- No production deploy was performed

## Locked Design Areas
- Customer scope
- Customer data model plan
- Vehicle data model plan
- Customer vehicle relation rules
- Soft Run fields
- Migration boundary from legacy
- SQL implementation plan
- UI plan
- Testing plan

## Next Mission Rule
Next mission should be Mission 15 - Customer / Vehicle Controlled Create Prototype only after approval.

## Final Signoff
Mission 14 is completed after these 12 Markdown files are committed and pushed.
